packet:
# First-Look Dry-Run Packet

## Prompt
You can see instruction.md and ls -R environment/, but not tests.
Where would you start looking, what command would you run, and what kind of bug do you expect?

## instruction.md
Staged bring-up for our image studio harness looks healthy early on, but replay-heavy maintenance shows late drift. Packaged byte digests diverge from coordinator materializations in promotion tails, and cross-span comparisons disagree without an obvious first-pass fault.

You must fix Python source code under `/app/environment` (not only change wrappers) so the regenerated transcript follows the public rules in `/app/environment/studio/app/docs/contract.md`. Static and manual output writes are not sufficient; the verifier deletes the output file and expects the shipped runner to recreate it from those rules.

The verifier deletes that file and reruns the same regeneration pipeline the solver should use:

    python3 /app/environment/runner.py --write /app/output/recovery_transcript.json

Do not hand-edit the JSON, bypass the runner, or rely on wrapper-only changes.

Source modules under `/app/environment` must also satisfy every rule above; runner-only edits are not sufficient on their own.

Verification is driven by /app/tests/test.sh, which installs runtimes and runs pytest on /app/tests/test_outputs.py inside the task image.

The regenerated `/app/output/recovery_transcript.json` must include run_id, phase, steps, entries, and per-entry artifact, digest_line, anchor_head, merge_lane (cleanup phases), and tail_seq; contract.md is the canonical definition of each field.

All field types, digest construction (including the standard-library hashing primitive named in contract.md), anchor prefix length, cleanup lane arithmetic keyed off schedule cleanup flags, global tail ordering, and idempotence are specified in contract.md together with the bundled schedule and fixture paths under `/app/environment/studio/app/data/`.

The packaged verifier installs Debian packages with lean apt options (recommended-package layer omitted) and runs pytest with CTRF reporting under `/logs/verifier/`; those harness mechanics never soften any rule in contract.md.

Explore ingest buffers, coordinator stitching, and promotion tail replay under `/app/environment` using contract.md as the single numeric reference.

- tests/
- solution/
- construction_manifest.json
- quality_check_adjudication.json
- waivers.json
